18:00
Yes, absolutely! That is actually a much smarter way to build it.

I just updated the Master Implementation Plan to use a Multi-Page Application (MPA) architecture.

Instead of trying to smash the complex React code (for milestones) and the Vanilla JS code (for duties) into one giant file, we will do exactly what you suggested:

The Hub (index.html): The new homepage with the Neon Banner and the 3 big tiles.
Clicking a Tile: It just navigates your browser to a completely separate URL (e.g., clicking Lifetime Activity takes you to milestones.html).
Preserving formatting: This means your existing app.jsx for milestones and your existing duties_leaderboard.html remain 100% perfectly intact with their unique formatting and logic. We just add a simple ← Back to Hub button to the top of those pages so users can get back to the main menu.
The Archive: We build the brand new staff_sheet.html as its own separate page using the Hybrid Archive UI we just discussed.
The updated implementation_plan.md artifact now reflects this exact setup for the other bot!

2. Fix Market Exchange Rates Icons and Labels The Live Market Exchange Rates section in economy.html has a mismatch between the icons and labels. For instance, the wave icon (🌊) which represents Wave Points is placed next to VBucks instead. The labels also need to be updated to better reflect the underlying rate values shown (e.g., 25 WP = 100 VB). Proposed Changes [MODIFY] economy.html Update the HTML to correct the icons and titles for the market cards and ticker: VBucks/Wave Points Market Card (Line ~239) Current:

🌊 VBucks ↔ Wave Points

New:

🌊 Wave Points ↔ 💎 VBucks

Loot Route/Wave Points Market Card (Line ~250) Current:

🗺️ Loot Route ↔ Wave Points

New:

🗺️ Loot Route ↔ 🌊 Wave Points

Ticker - VBucks/WP (Line ~423) Current: 🌊 VBUCKS/WP MARKET: New: 🌊 WP / 💎 VBUCKS MARKET: Ticker - LRP/WP (Line ~432) Current: 🗺️ LRP/WP MARKET: New: 🗺️ LRP / 🌊 WP MARKET: These changes will correctly associate the Wave Points (🌊), VBucks (💎), and Loot Route (🗺️) icons with their respective labels throughout the page.
